accept_eula.description: Whether model terms of use have been accepted
accept_eula.title: Accept Eula

metadata_name.description: Name of the jumpstart endpoint object
metadata_name.title: Metadata Name

model_id.description: Unique identifier of the model within the hub
model_id.title: Model Id

model_version.description: Semantic version of the model to deploy (e.g. 1.0.0)
model_version.title: Model Version

instance_type.description: EC2 instance type for the inference server
instance_type.title: Instance Type

accelerator_partition_type.description: MIG profile to use for GPU partitioning
accelerator_partition_type.title: Accelerator Partition Type

accelerator_partition_validation.description: Enable MIG validation for GPU partitioning. Default is true.
accelerator_partition_validation.title: Accelerator Partition Validation

endpoint_name.description: Name of SageMaker endpoint; empty string means no creation
endpoint_name.title: Endpoint Name

tls_certificate_output_s3_uri.description: S3 URI to write the TLS certificate
tls_certificate_output_s3_uri.title: Tls Certificate Output S3 Uri

custom_certificate_acm_arn.description: ACM certificate ARN for custom TLS certificate
custom_certificate_acm_arn.title: Custom Certificate Acm Arn

custom_certificate_domain_name.description: Domain name for the custom TLS certificate
custom_certificate_domain_name.title: Custom Certificate Domain Name

l2_cache_local_url.description: L2 cache URL to local storage
l2_cache_local_url.title: L2 Cache Local Url

load_balancer_health_check_path.description: Health check path for the ALB target group
load_balancer_health_check_path.title: Load Balancer Health Check Path

replicas.description: Number of inference server replicas. Default 1.
replicas.title: Replicas

max_deploy_time_in_seconds.description: Maximum deployment time in seconds. Defaults to 3600.
max_deploy_time_in_seconds.title: Max Deploy Time In Seconds

env.description: Map of environment variable names to their values
env.title: Env

metrics_scrape_interval_seconds.description: Scrape interval in seconds for metrics collection
metrics_scrape_interval_seconds.title: Metrics Scrape Interval Seconds

model_metrics_path.description: Path where the model exposes metrics
model_metrics_path.title: Model Metrics Path

model_metrics_port.description: Port where the model exposes metrics
model_metrics_port.title: Model Metrics Port

additional_configs.description: Additional model configs as key-value pairs
additional_configs.title: Additional Configs

gated_model_download_role.description: IAM role ARN for downloading gated models
gated_model_download_role.title: Gated Model Download Role

execution_role.description: IAM role ARN for deploying and managing the inference server
execution_role.title: Execution Role

auto_scaling_spec.description: Full autoScalingSpec JSON for autoscaling configuration
auto_scaling_spec.title: Auto Scaling Spec

dns_hosted_zone_id.description: Route53 Hosted Zone ID for DNS automation
dns_hosted_zone_id.title: Dns Hosted Zone Id

data_capture.description: Data capture configuration JSON for SageMaker, LoadBalancer, and Model Pod tiers
data_capture.title: Data Capture
